overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a high-speed night ride through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player navigates from street level onto elevated highways, through tunnels, and past massive holographic advertisements in a dense urban environment.

events.description: player mounts motorcycle and begins accelerating from stopped position
turns onto main road and transitions from street level to elevated highway approach

agents.ego_description: mounting the motorcycle and accelerating through the intersection, navigating around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: car ahead moving through the intersection in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings visible at the intersection ahead
low-rise commercial building with illuminated windows and signage on the corner
distant neon-lit skyscrapers and billboards visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a night-time urban intersection with the player mounting a motorcycle. Neon-lit buildings line the streets as the player accelerates from a stop, navigating through the intersection and approaching an elevated highway. The environment features typical cyberpunk aesthetics with glowing signage and wet asphalt reflecting city lights.

events.description: reaches high speed exceeding 100 km/h with motion blur effects on road surface
massive holographic advertisements become visible in the distance between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: racing along the elevated highway at high speed, weaving between other vehicles while approaching tunnel

notable_agents.action: red sports car ahead maintaining high speed on the highway

entered.detail: multi-lane raised roadway with concrete barriers and overhead lighting structures
large floating blue geometric holographic advertisement suspended between buildings
large floating red and orange holographic figure visible next to the blue display
tall modern glass and steel towers with illuminated windows lining the highway

segments.scene_description: The player accelerates onto an elevated highway surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers adorned with neon signage. Speed increases dramatically as massive holographic advertisements appear in the distance between buildings. The road stretches ahead with concrete barriers and occasional vehicles, creating a sense of high-speed urban traversal through a futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tunnel with blue neon lighting

events.description: enters covered tunnel structure with distinctive blue ceiling lighting
approaching tunnel exit with increasing light visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through the enclosed tunnel, following the vehicle ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: enclosed roadway with curved concrete ceiling and walls creating a tunnel effect
rows of blue neon lights running along the tunnel ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a covered tunnel structure with distinctive blue neon lighting lining the curved ceiling. The enclosed space blocks the open sky and holographic displays seen previously, creating an artificial lighting environment. The player maintains speed while approaching the bright exit at the far end of the tunnel.

events.description: exits tunnel back into open urban street with commercial buildings
makes sharp right turn at intersection with yellow grid crosswalk markings
navigates through intersection with other vehicles while following traffic flow

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and navigating through city streets, making right turns at intersections while avoiding other traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan ahead navigating the same intersection turn

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage for DELAMAIN visible on building facade
neon sign for EL COYOTE CO visible on right side of street
ground floor commercial establishments with illuminated storefronts and signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into street-level commercial districts with prominent signage including DELAMAIN and EL COYOTE CO. The player navigates through intersections with yellow grid crosswalks, making right turns while sharing the road with other vehicles. The environment features dense urban architecture with ground-floor shops and towering buildings overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban avenue with overpasses and commercial signage

events.description: passes under elevated highway overpass with structural supports visible
makes left turn at large intersection with yellow grid markings

agents.ego_description: continuing through downtown streets, passing under overpasses and navigating left turns at intersections while maintaining moderate speed

notable_agents.action: red sports car passing on the left side of the motorcycle

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning across the road ahead
covered section of roadway passing beneath the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the dense urban environment, passing under massive elevated highway overpasses and through covered underpass sections. The player makes a left turn at a large intersection with distinctive yellow grid markings. Neon signage and commercial buildings line the streets as the motorcycle navigates the final stretches of the downtown route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that begins at a neon-lit urban intersection and transitions through elevated highways and tunnels into a dense commercial district. It begins with the motorcycle accelerating from a stop across wet asphalt, moving through a glowing intersection before climbing onto an elevated highway. As the speed increases, the open cityscape expands to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements, which then vanish as the camera plunges into a curved tunnel defined by artificial blue neon lighting. The scene opens up again upon exiting the tunnel, shifting from the enclosed space to street-level commercial districts filled with prominent signage and yellow grid crosswalks. Finally, the camera navigates through a series of right and left turns, passing under massive highway overpasses and through covered underpasses amidst the dense architecture of the downtown route.
